title: malus toringo var. integrifolia
intro: Malus toringo var. integrifolia, also known as the Korean crab apple, is a variety of the Malus toringo plant, a species of apple tree native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Korean medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. Malus toringo var. integrifolia is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and its health benefits include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
